buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @portfolio/contracts build && cd apps/api && mkdir -p .vercel/output/functions/api/index.func && node_modules/.bin/esbuild src/entry-vercel.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=.vercel/output/functions/api/index.func/index.mjs --external:pino-pretty --external:pg-native && printf '{"runtime":"nodejs20.x","handler":"index.mjs","launcherType":"Nodejs","shouldAddHelpers":false}' > .vercel/output/functions/api/index.func/.vc-config.json && printf '{"version":3,"routes":[{"src":"^/(.*)","dest":"/api/index"}]}' > .vercel/output/config.json
